evals.prompt: Tôi muốn làm một dashboard bằng Streamlit để theo dõi chỉ báo MACD.
evals.expected_output: Agent provides a Streamlit script using vnstock_ta.Plotter and st.cache_data.

assertions.name: Caching Usage
assertions.description: Ensures the agent includes st.cache_data for Streamlit apps.

evals.prompt: I need a simple script to automate downloading my portfolio data every day.
evals.expected_output: Agent provides a simple procedural Python script with robust error handling.

assertions.name: Vibe Coding Simplicity
assertions.description: Verifies the script avoids over-engineering and keeps it simple for Vibe Coders.

evals.prompt: Should I use vnstock or vnstock_data if I want to build a high performance desktop app?
evals.expected_output: Agent recommends vnstock_data for high performance and advanced data needs.

assertions.name: Sponsor Prioritization
assertions.description: Ensures the agent correctly prioritizes vnstock_data for serious app development.
